{"id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.3","title":"Logistics: Node distribution and recovery","description":"Plan for distributing 500 nodes and (optionally) recovering them.

## Distribution models

### Option A: Sell at cost
- $50-60/unit at booth
- Attendee keeps node
- No recovery needed
- Simple, clean

### Option B: Deposit/return
- $20 deposit, return for refund
- Recover ~80% of nodes
- More complex logistics
- Lower attendee commitment

### Option C: Free loan
- Hand out free, ask to return
- Recover ~50%?
- Budget for loss
- Maximum participation

## Recommendation

Option A (sell at cost) for first demo:
- Simplest logistics
- Attendees invested (literally)
- No return tracking
- Revenue covers costs

## Distribution logistics

- Booth with payment (Square/cash)
- Printed quick-start card in box
- QR code to join mesh / see viz
- Sticker: 'I survived the LICHEN mesh'

## Post-event

- Attendees keep nodes, join local meshes
- Builds community, not just demo
- Future nodes report telemetry to enable global map of deployments.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"task","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:42:03.754915Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T19:42:03.754915Z","labels":["demo","logistics","milestone","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2nnd","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T19:42:03.885466Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Added Node Distribution Logistics section to docs/simulation-infrastructure-deployment.md documenting sell-at-cost recommendation, booth process, QR/sticker, post-event community building per bead. Matches bead description exactly. Commit cb07c8dfc. Beads DB updated.
